query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_bulk_send_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  totalRecipients INT NOT NULL,
  sent INT DEFAULT 0,
  failed INT DEFAULT 0,
  errors TEXT,
  createdAt BIGINT
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_bulk_send_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  totalRecipients INT NOT NULL,
  sent INT DEFAULT 0,
  failed INT DEFAULT 0,
  errors TEXT,
  createdAt BIGINT
);
